title: Cubis Foundry Skill Frontmatter
description: Validates YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files against the universal-skill-creator portable format.

name.description: Kebab-case skill identifier. Must match the directory name.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it. Include 3-5 trigger phrases.

compatibility.description: Target platforms (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot).
